/cwe/weakness/758.Name: Reliance on Undefined, Unspecified, or Implementation-Defined Behavior
/cwe/weakness/758.Description: The product uses an API function, data structure, or other entity in a way that relies on properties that are not always guaranteed to hold for that entity.
/cwe/weakness/758.ExtendedDescription: This can lead to resultant weaknesses when the required properties change, such as when the product is ported to a different platform or if an interaction error (CWE-435) occurs.

Entries.IntroText: This code assumes a particular function will always be found at a particular address. It assigns a pointer to that address and calls the function.

Entries.BodyText: The same function may not always be found at the same memory address. This could lead to a crash, or an attacker may alter the memory at the expected address, leading to arbitrary code execution.

Entries.IntroText: The following function returns a stack address.
